name: missmate
documentation:
# missmate
Simple functions to complement matplotlib.

missmate (missing matplotlib) is imported as `mim`

functions.name: missmate.utils.unpack_2d_list
documentation: Unpack a 2d list into a 1d list

functions.name: missmate.utils.concat_all_dict_values_into_list
documentation: Concat all values in dict into a single list

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_text.set_fontsize
documentation: Set font size for all text elements

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_text.two_digit_sci_not
documentation: Convert a float to a string in scientific notation with 2 digits in the exponent and no decimals.

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_text.readable_p
documentation:
Convert a scientific-notation p-value (str) to a readable string (to be formated by matplotlib).
Always ceil the decimal (for rounding, see readable_p_exact()). 
If a float is given, it is first converted to a string using two_digit_sci_not().

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_text.readable_p_exact
documentation: Convert a p-value (float) to a readable string, without ceiling.

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_text.readable_p_significance_statement
documentation: Convert a p-value (float) to significance notation (p < 0.001, p < 0.01, p < 0.05, n.s.; as well as asterisks).

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.naked
documentation: Remove all spines, ticks and labels

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.get_list_ticklabels
documentation:
Note: only works if figure has been drawn. Otherwise returns empty list.
To draw figure, use plt.show() or plt.draw()

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.equal_xy_lims
documentation: Set xlim equal to ylim (by their max)

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.equal_lims_two_axs
documentation: Set xlim equal to ylim across two axes

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.equal_lims_n_axs
documentation: Set ax lims equal across list of ax, but xlim and ylim are seperate here

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.remove_xticklabels
documentation: remove x ticklabels but keep ticks

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.remove_yticklabels
documentation: remove y ticklabels but keep ticks

functions.name: missmate.visualisation_axes.add_panel_label
documentation:
Add a panel label to ax. 
Either the str given by label_letter or the i-th letter given by label_ind. 
Panel label is automatically placed at top-left corner. But can be overridden by using x_override and y_override. 
By default using regular fontsize, but can be overriden by setting fontsize. 

IMPORTANT: run this function AFTER figure is drawn (plt.draw())

Coordinates are in axes fraction.
